name: ASUS PROART B650-CREATOR ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - USB-C (DisplayPort Alt Mode) - 1Gb LAN - 2.5Gb LAN - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C Front-Panel Connector w/ QC 4+
